data.title: Move cascade-replan-protocol.md and fix all dev-team artifact path references in plugin agent and skill files
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Fix all remaining dev-team artifact path references across plugin agent and skill files. This task covers DD3, DD4, DD5, and DD7 of story ec03-5076.

### Changes required:

1. **Move cascade-replan-protocol.md** (DD3):
   - Create directory: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/
   - Move plugins/dso/docs/designs/cascade-replan-protocol.md → plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/cascade-replan-protocol.md
   - Update 3 references in plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md from plugins/dso/docs/designs/cascade-replan-protocol.md to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/cascade-replan-protocol.md
   - Update 1 reference in plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/replan-user-prompt.md

2. **Remove playwright-debug stale reference** (DD4):
   - In plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md line 468: remove the sentence "For CLI command patterns and session management, see the spike report at plugins/dso/docs/designs/playwright-cli-spike-report.md."

3. **Fix ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md output path** (DD5):
   - In plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md line 91: change "plugins/dso/docs/designs/<uuid>/" to "docs/designs/<uuid>/"
   - Add prohibition: agent must not write to plugins/dso/

4. **Fix ui-designer.md write destinations** (DD7):
   - In plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md: change DESIGN_ROOT from "plugins/dso/docs/designs" to "docs/designs" (2 occurrences at lines 157 and 378)
   - Update all ticket comment paths from "plugins/dso/docs/designs/<uuid>/" to "docs/designs/<uuid>/" (lines 231, 481+)
   - Update UI_DESIGNER_PAYLOAD paths in JSON block (lines 545-549)

5. **Fix intent-search.md example path** (DD7):
   - In plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md line 185: change example path from "plugins/dso/docs/designs/" to "docs/designs/"

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/cascade-replan-protocol.md (move/delete)
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/cascade-replan-protocol.md (create — moved file)
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (modify — 3 ref updates)
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/replan-user-prompt.md (modify — 1 ref update)
- plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md (modify — remove 1 line)
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md (modify — path + prohibition)
- plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md (modify — DESIGN_ROOT + all path refs)
- plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md (modify — 1 example path)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] cascade-replan-protocol.md exists at plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/cascade-replan-protocol.md
- [ ] cascade-replan-protocol.md does NOT exist at plugins/dso/docs/designs/
  Verify: test ! -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/designs/cascade-replan-protocol.md
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md has zero references to plugins/dso/docs/designs/cascade-replan-protocol.md
  Verify: ! grep -q 'plugins/dso/docs/designs/cascade-replan-protocol' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Playwright-debug SKILL.md has no playwright-cli-spike-report.md reference
  Verify: ! grep -q 'playwright-cli-spike-report' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md
- [ ] ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md uses docs/designs/ path (not plugins/dso/docs/designs/)
  Verify: grep -q 'docs/designs/<uuid>/' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md && ! grep -q 'plugins/dso/docs/designs/<uuid>/' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md
- [ ] DD7 grep gate passes: zero matches for dev-team artifact paths in agents/ and skills/
  Verify: test "$(git grep -r -c 'plugins/dso/docs/designs\|plugins/dso/docs/findings\|plugins/dso/docs/archive' -- 'plugins/dso/agents/' 'plugins/dso/skills/' 2>/dev/null | wc -l)" -eq 0
- [ ] RED tests test_cascade_replan_at_skill_path and test_no_dev_artifact_paths_in_plugin_agents_skills pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-refs.sh 2>&1 | grep -c PASS | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
